_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in testing and evaluating machine learning algorithms and/or AI solutions.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to distinguish between problems that require machine learning and problems that can be solved more simply and reliably with rule-based logic or statistical methods.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI AI domain. AI-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-S-006 (AG, cosine: 0.645), AI-S-018 (AI, cosine: 0.643).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.543). Shared vocabulary: [learning, machine]. DCWF-only terms [ai, algorithms, evaluating, skill, solutions, testing] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, based, distinguish, logic, methods, more] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.898, R=0.865). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.2%). "Skill in testing and evaluating machine learning algorithms and/or AI solutions." and "Ability to distinguish between problems that require machine learning and proble" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.653 > STS 0.543 (gap +0.110). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [learning, machine] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.3%. Shared tokens: [learning, machine]. DCWF-only: [ai, algorithms, evaluating, skill, solutions, testing]. WIDAI-only: [ability, based, distinguish, logic, methods, more].

signals.detail: STS 0.543 barely clears classification threshold for Equal. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
